word: H7236 - רְבָה - rᵉbâh - reb-aw' - Make a great man

sections.paragraph:
Original: רבה

Transliteration: rebâh

Phonetic: reb-aw'

BDB Definition:

  1. to grow great
    1. (Peal) to grow long, grow tall and large, grow great, increase
    2. (Pael) to make great

Origin: corresponding to H7235

TWOT entry: 2985

Part(s) of speech: Verb
